MOTION TO COMPEL FURTHER RESPONSE TO REQUEST, DEMAND INSPECTION, PRODUCTION OF DOCUMENTS
Off Calendar Aug-13-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF ROY ABILA''S MOTION TO COMPEL FURTHER RESPONSE TO REQUEST, DEMAND INSPECTION, PRODUCTION OF DOCUMENTS is granted. No opposition filed. Prevailing party shall prepare and submit a proposed order. Judge Pro Tem: Nils Rosenquest, Clerk: Sean Kane, Not Reported. (302/JPT)
